# BigBoldTech — Enterprise Technology Partners

> BigBoldTech is an enterprise technology agency headquartered in India,
> serving ambitious businesses globally. We build AI systems, SaaS platforms,
> mobile apps, web applications, and performance marketing engines for
> businesses generating $1M+ in revenue.

## About BigBoldTech

BigBoldTech (BigBoldTech Pvt. Ltd.) is a full-spectrum technology and growth agency founded in 2023. We partner exclusively with established businesses that need enterprise-grade technology infrastructure, AI integration, performance marketing at scale, and comprehensive growth systems. Our team combines deep engineering expertise with strategic marketing to deliver systems that compound growth.

## Services

### Technology Services
- [AI & Automation](https://bigboldtech.com/services/ai-automation): Custom AI agents, LLM integrations (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain), intelligent chatbots, workflow automation, and predictive analytics for enterprise operations
- [SaaS Product Development](https://bigboldtech.com/services/saas-development): Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with billing (Stripe), authentication, admin dashboards, API-first architecture, and auto-scaling infrastructure
- [Web Applications](https://bigboldtech.com/services/web-apps): Next.js platforms, admin panels, e-commerce engines, customer portals built for speed, SEO, and conversion
- [Mobile Applications](https://bigboldtech.com/services/mobile-apps): Cross-platform Flutter apps for iOS and Android with push notifications, real-time features, and offline-first architecture
- [DevOps & Cloud](https://bigboldtech.com/services/devops): CI/CD pipelines, Docker/Kubernetes orchestration, server hardening, WAF, monitoring, auto-scaling, and disaster recovery on AWS/Linode

### Growth Services
- [Performance Marketing](https://bigboldtech.com/services/performance-marketing): Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn campaigns with ROAS-first strategy, full-funnel attribution, and intelligent budget allocation
- [SEO & Organic Growth](https://bigboldtech.com/services/seo): Technical SEO, content strategy, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), LLMO (LLM Optimization)
- [Email & CRM Automation](https://bigboldtech.com/services/email-marketing): Lifecycle email flows, transactional messaging, WhatsApp Business API, CRM integration, and deliverability optimization
- [Analytics & Intelligence](https://bigboldtech.com/services/analytics): GA4 advanced setups, custom Looker dashboards, event tracking, attribution modeling, and real-time business intelligence

## Industries Served

- [Finance & Fintech](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/finance): AI-powered fraud detection, secure payment platforms, regulatory compliance automation
- [Healthcare & Life Sciences](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-compliant portals, telehealth platforms, clinical analytics
- [E-Commerce & Retail](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/ecommerce): Headless commerce, AI recommendations, omnichannel marketing
- [Real Estate & PropTech](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/real-estate): Property management SaaS, market analysis tools, tenant engagement
- [SaaS & Technology](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/saas): Dedicated dev teams, architecture optimization, growth marketing
- [Manufacturing & Industrial](https://bigboldtech.com/industries/manufacturing): IoT dashboards, predictive maintenance, supply chain systems

## Key Results

- 50+ enterprise projects delivered
- Clients across 21+ cities globally
- 99.9% system uptime
- 340% average revenue increase for clients
- 94% fraud reduction for fintech client (NovaPay Financial)
- 3x site speed improvement for e-commerce migration (Luxe Retail Group)

## Technology Stack

Frontend: React, Next.js, Flutter, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, Prisma ORM
AI/ML: OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Pinecone
Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Linode, Cloudflare, GitHub Actions
Marketing: Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, GTM, Looker Studio, HubSpot
Automation: Pabbly Connect, Engine Mailer, WhatsApp Business API, RabbitMQ

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What kind of businesses does BigBoldTech work with?
A: BigBoldTech partners exclusively with established businesses generating $1M+ in revenue who need enterprise-grade technology infrastructure, AI integration, performance marketing at scale, and comprehensive growth systems.

Q: What services does BigBoldTech offer?
A: BigBoldTech offers end-to-end technology services including AI & Automation, SaaS Development, Web & Mobile Apps, Performance Marketing, SEO & Organic Growth, Email Marketing, DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure, and Analytics & BI.

Q: Where is BigBoldTech located?
A: BigBoldTech is headquartered in India and serves clients globally across North America, Europe, Middle East, and Asia-Pacific.

Q: How does BigBoldTech approach AI integration?
A: We are AI-native, not AI-bolt-on. Every system we build considers where AI can multiply efficiency — from custom LLM agents to predictive analytics to AI-powered marketing optimization.

Q: What makes BigBoldTech different from other agencies?
A: We are builder-led, not sales-led. Your point of contact writes code. We own the full stack — from infrastructure to marketing pixels — so there is no finger-pointing between vendors.
